pattern_data.row7_label: Sensitive Item Category (Primary Items, all four companies)

excluded_billets: Medical / BAS billets (34), medical facility CCN required
EOD Section billets (13), EOD facility CCN required
Specialist shop billets (99), maintenance shop CCN(s) required
Ordnance repair billets (10), ordnance shop CCN required

officers.label: Private Offices (CO, XO, CSE, Chaplain, S-Staff Officers)

enlisted.label: Cubicles (S-Staff NCOs, Company Admin, Supply, Ops)
Hospital Corpsmen / Field Med Tech / Dental Asst

pattern_data.calc_label: Galley/Mess Hall Space (CLB-4 cooks; FC 2-000-05N Series 700 CCN 722 10 PN-driven authoritative formula in BFR Generator pages 29-35)

loading_label: Organizational Vehicle Parking (count of CLB-4 motor pool vehicles); FAC 8521; cited factor 75 SY/vehicle for FMF Ground Units (50 SY/vehicle if >50% are <=18ft x 6.5ft); UoM=SY; user-supplied spec 2026-04-30 pending FC 2-000-05N Series 800 cross-check
Vehicle Staging Area for mount-out operations (SY); FAC 8523; sized by mission scale not by parked-vehicle count; CLB-4 placeholder 5000 SY pending unit doctrine input
Vehicular Parking Unsurfaced (SY); FAC 8522; calculated using 85210 criteria when used; CLB-4 sets to 0 because primary parking is paved per 85210

Station Security and Perimeter Fencing (LF); FAC 8721; standard 7-ft chain link with 1.5-ft outriggers and 3 strands BB; min 50-150 ft from buildings/critical supplies; SRC I/II ammo fence per DoDM 5100.76 + UFC 4-022-03; CLB-4 placeholder 2000 LF pending compound perimeter survey
Entry Gate (LF); FAC 8721; CCN added Jan 2024; CLB-4 default 30 LF for 1-2 main gates pending site survey
Mechanical Security Barricade (EA); FAC 1458; drop arm barriers at gates; CLB-4 default 2 EA (one per gate)
Hazardous Waste Storage Building (SF); FAC 4423; 150-meter buffer from inhabited areas, ammo, or POL stores; short-term <90 days vs long-term >90 days; CLB-4 placeholder 400 SF for unit HAZMAT point
Hazardous Waste Storage and Transfer Facility (EA); FAC 8926; non-building structures; same 150-meter buffer rule; CLB-4 default 1 EA
Standby Generator Plant (KW); FAC 8112; mission-essential standby power; CLB-4 placeholder 150 KW pending engineering load study
Fire Alarm System (MI); FAC 1351; linear miles of fire-alarm wiring across CLB-4 compound; placeholder 1 MI pending site survey
Other Paved Areas Not in 100/400 Series (SY); FAC 8526; miscellaneous hardstand; CLB-4 placeholder 1000 SY
Misc Open Storage/Laydown Area Paved (SY); FAC 8526; PW open storage allowances per Table 85240-1; CLB-4 placeholder 2000 SY pending shop-type breakdown
